title: The Between
description: A fast travel mod with Minecrafty Portals
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5844ff9bdd29adca93e1ad556ce9484cbc13ce18.png)

# About The Between

The Between is a mod that introduces customizable portal-based fast travel, allowing players to create and link their own teleportation networks.

## Ruined Portals and Keystone

Ruined Between portals can be found scattered across all 3 dimensions, being rarest in the Overworld and most common in the End. These structures contain valuable loot, including the key material used to build your own portals, **Keystone**.

Keystone is a durable block that can only be broken using diamond-tier tools, it can however be engraved using any tool and its main use is being the primary material for constructing Between Portals.

## Building Between Portals

Between Portals are similar to Nether portals, but with with some key differences:
- Minimum size: 2×2 (instead of 3×2)
- Can be built vertically or sideways
- Need to have their 4 corners engraved

![Possible Portal Configurations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30653d6ff13216100b08a897acef3e0f1197c83d.png)
Some possible portal configurations.

## Linking Between Portals

Portal linking is based on engravings, two portals automatically connect when their corner carvings match.
Portals can only link within the same dimension.
